data.title: Features
data.description: Everything @webhouse/cms can do — from AI agents to static builds.

sections.headline: Built different. By design.
sections.subline: Not WordPress. Not headless-for-the-sake-of-it. An opinionated, developer-first CMS built by engineers who've shipped over 1,000 websites.

sections.heading: Core Engine
sections.subheading: The foundation that makes everything else possible.
sections.items: [{"title":"Developer-First API","description":"TypeScript-native. Fully typed schema definitions. No web UI required — define your content model in code.","icon":"⌨","tag":"TypeScript"},{"title":"AI-Native Content Workflows","description":"Built-in AI Agents. Generate, rewrite, translate, proofread, and SEO-optimize content with a single command.","icon":"⚡","tag":"AI Agents"},{"title":"Static-First Output","description":"Compiles to clean HTML + CSS. 95-100 Lighthouse scores out of the box. No runtime framework. No CMS-shaped attack surface.","icon":"▲","tag":"Static"},{"title":"Git-Committable Content","description":"Filesystem adapter stores content as JSON. Your entire site — code and content — lives in a single git repository.","icon":"◇","tag":"Git"},{"title":"Multi-Language (i18n)","description":"translationGroup UUID links all locale versions. Side-by-side editing. AI auto-translation. Hreflang in sitemap. Locale routing.","icon":"🌐","tag":"i18n"},{"title":"SEO & GEO Module","description":"13-rule SEO scoring, keyword tracking, JSON-LD schemas, OG images, AI-optimized robots.txt, llms.txt for AI discovery.","icon":"📈","tag":"SEO"}]

sections.heading: Content Production
sections.subheading: AI agents that actually ship content — not just suggest it.
sections.items: [{"title":"Chat Interface","description":"40+ tools. Create documents, rewrite fields, optimize SEO, manage media — all from a conversational interface.","icon":"💬","tag":"Chat"},{"title":"Interactives Engine","description":"AI-generated calculators, quizzes, charts, and interactive widgets. Embedded inline in richtext content.","icon":"🎯","tag":"Ints"},{"title":"Media Processing","description":"Sharp WebP conversion, EXIF extraction, AI image analysis with per-locale captions and alt-text.","icon":"🖼","tag":"Media"},{"title":"Content Scheduling","description":"Schedule posts for future publication. Automated publishing at the configured time.","icon":"📅","tag":"Scheduler"},{"title":"Link Checker","description":"Automated link validation across your entire site. AI-powered fix suggestions for broken links.","icon":"🔗","tag":"Links"},{"title":"Backup & Restore","description":"Full site backups on schedule. Point-in-time restore. Version history for every document.","icon":"💾","tag":"Backup"}]

sections.heading: Infrastructure
sections.subheading: Deploy anywhere. Store content however you want.
sections.items: [{"title":"4 Storage Adapters","description":"Filesystem (local JSON), GitHub (bidirectional sync), SQLite (single file), Supabase (serverless + real-time).","icon":"🗄","tag":"Storage"},{"title":"4 Deploy Targets","description":"One-click deploy to GitHub Pages, Vercel, Netlify, or Fly.io. CI/CD with GitHub Actions.","icon":"🚀","tag":"Deploy"},{"title":"Multi-Site Admin","description":"Manage multiple sites from a single admin dashboard. Org-level settings inheritance.","icon":"🏢","tag":"Multi-Site"},{"title":"MCP Protocol","description":"Two MCP servers — public read-only for AI discovery, authenticated for full content production.","icon":"🔌","tag":"MCP"}]

sections.heading: Ready to build?
sections.subheading: One command to scaffold. Under 50 lines of config. 95+ Lighthouse score out of the box.
